lines.raw: Who paid for Tony's dinner? | 谁付了托尼的晚餐钱？

lines.english: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in.
lines.chinese: 我正在一家餐馆吃饭，这时托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。
lines.raw: I was having dinner at a restaurant when Tony Steele came in. | 我正在一家餐馆吃饭，这时托尼·斯蒂尔走了进来。

lines.english: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago,
lines.chinese: 托尼多年前在一家律师事务所工作，
lines.raw: Tony worked in a lawyer's office years ago, | 托尼多年前在一家律师事务所工作，

lines.english: but he is now working at a bank.
lines.chinese: 但他现在在一家银行工作。
lines.raw: but he is now working at a bank. | 但他现在在一家银行工作。
He gets a good salary, | 他薪水很高，

lines.english: but he always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back.
lines.chinese: 但他总是向朋友借钱，从不还。
lines.raw: but he always borrows money from his friends and never pays it back. | 但他总是向朋友借钱，从不还。

lines.english: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table.
lines.chinese: 托尼看到了我，走过来坐在同一张桌子旁。
lines.raw: Tony saw me and came and sat at the same table. | 托尼看到了我，走过来坐在同一张桌子旁。

lines.english: He has never borrowed money from me.
lines.raw: He has never borrowed money from me. | 他从没向我借过钱。

lines.english: While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds.
lines.chinese: 他吃饭的时候，我请他借给我二十英镑。
lines.raw: While he was eating, I asked him to lend me twenty pounds. | 他吃饭的时候，我请他借给我二十英镑。

lines.english: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately.
lines.chinese: 令我惊讶的是，他立刻把钱给了我。
lines.raw: To my surprise, he gave me the money immediately. | 令我惊讶的是，他立刻把钱给了我。

lines.english: 'I have never borrowed any money from you,'
lines.raw: 'I have never borrowed any money from you,' | “我从没向你借过钱，”

lines.english: Tony said, 'so now you can pay for my dinner!'
lines.chinese: 托尼说，“所以现在你可以为我的晚餐付钱了！”
lines.raw: Tony said, 'so now you can pay for my dinner!' | 托尼说，“所以现在你可以为我的晚餐付钱了！”
